addons.name: uBlock Origin
addons.description: Finally, an efficient wide-spectrum content blocker. Easy on CPU and memory.
addons.fullDescription:
uBlock Origin is not an "ad blocker", it's a wide-spectrum content blocker with CPU and memory efficiency as a primary feature. Out of the box, uBO blocks ads, trackers, coin miners, popups, etc. through the following lists of filters, enabled by default: EasyList (ads) EasyPrivacy (tracking) Peter Lowe’s Ad server list (ads and tracking) Online Malicious URL Blocklist uBO's own lists More lists are available for you to select if you wish: EasyList Cookie Fanboy Annoyances AdGuard Annoyances Dan Pollock’s hosts file And many others Additionally, you can point-and-click to block JavaScript locally or globally, create your own global or local rules to override entries from filter lists, and many more advanced features. Free. Open source with public license (GPLv3) For users by users. If ever you really do want to contribute something, think about the people working hard to maintain the filter lists you are using, which were made available to use by all for free.
  • Documentation
  • Release notes
  • Community support @ Reddit
  • Contributors @ GitHub
  • Contributors @ Crowdin

screenshots.caption: The popup panel in Firefox Preview: default mode with more blocking options revealed
The unified logger tells you all that uBO is seeing and doing

addons.name: Unhook: Remove YouTube Recommended Videos Comments
addons.description: Hide YouTube related videos, comments, video suggestions wall, homepage recommendations, trending tab, and other distractions.
addons.fullDescription:
Hide YouTube related videos, comments, video suggestions wall, homepage recommendations, trending tab, and other distractions.

A browser extension to eliminate distractions on YouTube, including the recommended sidebar, endscreen video suggestions, user comments, homepage related videos feed, trending tab, turn off autoplay or annotations, and more. Toggle the options through the popup to customize your own YouTube experience!

Compatible with mobile YouTube, m.youtube.com, through Firefox for Android. Also works on video embeds.

To request a feature, fill out our feedback form!

Unhook YouTube is also available as an extension for Chrome and Microsoft Edge.

If you find Unhook useful, please consider making a contribution!

OPTIONS

    Hide Homepage Feed
    Hide Video Sidebar
        Hide Recommended (Related Videos)
        Hide Live Chat
        Hide Playlist
    Hide End Screen Videowall
    Hide End Screen Cards
    Hide Comments
        Hide Profile Photos
    Hide Mix Radio Playlists
    Hide Merch, Tickets, Offers
    Hide Video Info
        Hide Video Buttons Bar (share, likes, dislikes)
        Hide Channel (profile + subscribe button)
        Hide Video Description
    Hide Top Header
        Hide Notification Bell
    Hide Irrelevant Search Results ("Related to your search", "Latest from", "Searches related to", "People also search for", etc.)
    Hide Explore and Trending
    Hide More from YouTube
    Hide Shorts Tab
    Hide and Redirect Subscriptions
    Disable Autoplay
    Disable Annotations


YouTube is a trademark of Google Inc. Use of this trademark is subject to Google Permissions.

screenshots.caption: Unhook YouTube options popup - remove YouTube home recommendations
Hide YouTube's right sidebar (suggested videos, live chat, playlists) and/or hide and disable autoplay, annotations
Hide end screen videowall and/or hide comments
Hide YouTube home feed and/or hide left bar extra elements
Compatible with mobile (Firefox for Android) and YouTube embedded videos

addons.name: Enhancer for YouTube™
addons.description: Take control of YouTube and boost your user experience!
addons.fullDescription:
Enhancer for YouTube™ is the ultimate tool to supercharge your YouTube experience with a host of highly customizable features, making it smoother and more enjoyable. Whether you’re looking to fine-tune playback settings or customize the look and feel, this YouTube enhancer gives you complete control to tailor YouTube to your needs.

Key Features:

Video Playback:
• Quickly adjust playback speed, quality, volume, and more with the mouse wheel or keyboard shortcuts.
• Playback Speed: Set a default playback speed and adjust it anywhere from 0.07x to 16x while watching.
• Playback Quality: Set a default playback quality for videos, playlists, and embedded videos.
• Volume Booster: Boost volume and bass for louder, clearer sound (up to 10x audio boost).
• Enhanced Loop Mode: Repeat specific parts or the entire video effortlessly.
• Autoplay Control: Fine-tune or disable YouTube’s autoplay features for better control.
• Video Formats: Disable high frame rate formats (60fps).

Appearance and Themes:
• Video Filters: Adjust brightness, contrast, color, and more without changing your monitor's settings.
• Custom Themes: Personalize YouTube's appearance with custom themes to suit your style.
• Cinema Mode: Dim everything around the player to keep your focus on the video.

Video Player:
• Wide Player: Expand the player beyond the default Theater Mode, or fill the entire screen without going full screen.
• Mini Player: Keep watching while reading comments so you never miss a moment.

Distractions and Shorts:
• Block Distractions: Hide end screens, info cards, recommendations, related videos, chat, or comments.
• YouTube Shorts: Hide Shorts or watch Shorts like regular videos.

Other Features:
• Screenshot: Capture high-quality screenshots of your favorite video moments.
• Keyboard Shortcuts: Set up customizable keyboard shortcuts to control YouTube like a pro.

And more!

Get the most popular YouTube enhancer now and transform the way you watch YouTube forever!

———

Enhancer for YouTube™ is a third-party extension and is not affiliated with YouTube.
YouTube is a trademark of Google LLC. Use of this trademark is subject to Google Permissions.

Also available for Chrome, Brave, Opera and Microsoft Edge

addons.name: Dislikes in YouTube™
addons.description: The extension returns the ability to see how many people YouTube video have put dislikes.
addons.fullDescription:
The extension returns the ability to see how many people YouTube video have put dislikes. YouTube used to display disliking on content creators' videos, but now it doesn't. So this extension displays the dislikes of all videos uploaded by youTube correctly in front of the user like the previous theme. It does not show you any false data it tries to present you the correct data.

After downloading this extension, you don't have to do any settings or turn anything on or off, just install it. After installation you just open any video on YouTube and you will see the dislike of that video. You will see how many dislikes the video has received. Previously YouTube likes and dislikes were seen but now YouTube doesn't do that anymore. With this extension you can see all the number of dislikes of YouTube videos. This extension aims to restore power to users by using a combination of archived like and dislike data, as well as the likes and dislikes made by extension users to show the most accurate ratings.

addons.name: StylerGPT for ChatGPT
addons.description: Custom Themes for ChatGPT, Prompt Manager, Prompt History, Folders, Export to PDF/DOCX, Bulk Actions, Message Navigator, and more!
addons.fullDescription:
StylerGPT is an all-in-one browser extension for ChatGPT, for people who want a cleaner, more personal, and more productive workspace. Customize your interface with themes, backgrounds, fonts, colors, chat folders, local exports, reusable prompts, navigation tools, and focused workflow upgrades.

*** New in StylerGPT ***

🪄 Prompt Enhancer: rewrite the current draft in Static mode, or use Interactive mode to answer guided questions and select options before generating the improved version.
🧩 Prompt Manager: save, organize, search, favorite, archive, edit, and insert reusable prompts directly inside the ChatGPT composer.
📁 Chat Folders: organize conversations into local folders from the native sidebar.
📄 Chat Export: export conversations locally as PDF, DOCX, Markdown, TXT, or JSON.
💻 Code Block Themes: customize how code blocks appear inside your chats.
↵ Enter for new lines: make Enter create a new line and send with Shift+Enter.
🕘 Message timestamps: show the date and time above each message in the conversation.
🎨 Chat bubble text colors: set separate text colors for user and assistant chat bubbles from Chat Layout.

*** Themes and Customization ***

🎨 1000+ ready-made ChatGPT themes for light and dark workflows, including dedicated accessibility themes for easier reading.
🖼️ 1000+ backgrounds and wallpapers, plus custom image uploads.
🔤 1000+ Google fonts for ChatGPT, with font size controls and interface or chat-message scope.
🌈 Color palettes, custom accent colors, vibrant mode, and a gradient generator for custom themes.
🛋️ Background color, gradient, image, opacity, and position controls for a more comfortable workspace layout.
📐 Chat layout controls for conversation width, user and assistant bubble backgrounds, and separate text colors.
🏷️ Brand mask controls to customize the logo area and model label in your own workspace.
💻 Code block styling for developers who spend time reading generated code.

*** Organization and Chat Tools ***

📁 Chat Folders: create local folders, customize folder color and icon, and assign conversations from the sidebar.
✅ Bulk Actions: select visible chats and delete or archive multiple conversations at once.
📄 Chat Export: export the current conversation as PDF, DOCX, Markdown, TXT, or JSON without sending it to a remote export service.
🧭 Message Navigator: jump to the first, previous, next, or last message without endless scrolling.
🕘 Message timestamps: show when each user or assistant message was sent, directly in the chat.
🕘 Prompt History: use Ctrl/Cmd + Up or Down in the message box to cycle through previous prompts.
🧩 Prompt Manager: build a personal prompt library with folders, variables, favorites, archive, and quick insertion.
📋 Clipboard Access: open recent clipboard items from the composer and insert them faster.
↵ Enter for new lines: make Enter create a new line and send with Shift+Enter.

*** Power Tools ***

🔄 BG Roulette: rotate workspace backgrounds automatically by interval, category, and opacity.
▶️ YT Summarizer: extract a YouTube transcript and open ChatGPT with a ready-to-send summary or highlights prompt.
📄 Chat Export: create clean local PDF or DOCX files with selectable text, code labels, emoji, dark-theme support, and non-Latin text.
🪄 Prompt Enhancer: refine the current draft before you send with a quick Static mode or an Interactive mode that asks questions and lets you choose answers, then replace the composer text or copy the improved version.
🧱 Prompt variables: turn reusable prompts into templates with fields you can fill before inserting.
⚡ Quick prompt insertion: type // or your chosen trigger in the message composer to open saved prompts faster.

StylerGPT is designed for developers, writers, students, marketers, researchers, creators, and professionals who spend long sessions in the same workspace and want more control over the interface.

Use StylerGPT to make ChatGPT easier to read, easier to organize, and easier to reuse. Keep conversations clean with folders, bulk actions, and optional message timestamps. Keep your favorite prompts ready with Prompt Manager and Prompt History, and refine drafts before sending with Prompt Enhancer in Static mode or Interactive question-and-answer mode. Keep long chats portable with local PDF, DOCX, Markdown, TXT, and JSON export. Keep your workspace comfortable with themes, fonts, colors, backgrounds, chat layout controls, and separate bubble text colors for user and assistant messages. The native flow stays recognizable, with local organization, export, prompt, and appearance controls where daily users need them.

How to use StylerGPT:

    Install the extension.
    Pin StylerGPT in your browser.
    Open ChatGPT.
    Open the StylerGPT panel from the toolbar or with Ctrl + Alt + S.
    Choose your theme, background, font, folders, prompts, and tools.


Free trial available: unlock StylerGPT Power features for 7 days.

Privacy-friendly by design. StylerGPT focuses on local customization and local workflow tools for ChatGPT.

ChatGPT is a registered trademark of OpenAI OpCo, LLC. All logos, trademarks, and registered trademarks are the property of their respective owners.

This extension is not affiliated with or endorsed by OpenAI.
